title: senecio promatensis
intro: Senecio promatensis, also known as Prairie Groundsel, is a flowering plant native to the prairies of North America. It belongs to the daisy family and has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio promatensis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Senecio promatensis is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and can be found in various herbal preparations, including creams and ointments.
